metadata.description: Centralized business rules for license optimization and user classification
metadata.notes: This file externalizes all hardcoded rules from analyze_usage.py, license_optimizer.py, and usage_analyzer.py

capacity_planning.description: Total AppPoints contracted with IBM Maximo for FORESEA

premium_modules.description: Modules that REQUIRE PREMIUM licensing (Oil & Gas context)

standard_modules.description: Modules that do NOT require Premium (BASE licensing)

priority_domains.description: Email domains that classify user as FORESEA permanent employee

offshore_keywords.description: Keywords in TITLE or PERSONGROUP that identify OFFSHORE workers (shift-based, 12h rotations)

critical_functions.description: Job titles that require AUTHORIZED access even if OFFSHORE (24/7 availability needed)

og_group_keywords.description: Security group name patterns that indicate O&G access requiring Premium

user_tier_rules.description: Rules for classifying users into tiers based on usage patterns

IDLE.description: User with zero logins in last 90 days

VERY_LIGHT.description: User with extremely low usage (< 5 logins/90d)

CRITICAL_OFFSHORE_OG.condition: operational_presence == OFFSHORE AND is_critical_function AND has_premium_access
CRITICAL_OFFSHORE_OG.description: Offshore critical roles (supervisor, almoxarife) with O&G access

CRITICAL_OFFSHORE_STD.condition: operational_presence == OFFSHORE AND is_critical_function AND NOT has_premium_access
CRITICAL_OFFSHORE_STD.description: Offshore critical roles without O&G access

OFFSHORE_OG.condition: operational_presence == OFFSHORE AND NOT is_critical_function AND has_premium_access
OFFSHORE_OG.description: Offshore operational roles (technicians, operators) with O&G access

OFFSHORE_STD.condition: operational_presence == OFFSHORE AND NOT is_critical_function AND NOT has_premium_access
OFFSHORE_STD.description: Offshore operational roles without O&G access

POWER_OG.condition: operational_presence == ONSHORE AND has_premium_access AND login_count_90d > 60
POWER_OG.description: Onshore high-usage users with O&G access

MEDIUM_OG.condition: operational_presence == ONSHORE AND has_premium_access AND login_count_90d <= 60
MEDIUM_OG.description: Onshore medium-usage users with O&G access

POWER_STD.condition: operational_presence == ONSHORE AND NOT has_premium_access AND login_count_90d > 60
POWER_STD.description: Onshore high-usage users without O&G access

MEDIUM_STD.condition: operational_presence == ONSHORE AND NOT has_premium_access AND login_count_90d <= 60
MEDIUM_STD.description: Onshore medium-usage users without O&G access

premium_without_og_usage.condition: Has PREMIUM license but zero O&G apps accessed

usage_analysis_parameters.note: These parameters control how we segment users and identify patterns

FORESEA.description: Permanent FORESEA employees (should be migrated to modern platform)

TEMPORARY.description: Contractors / temporary employees (should NOT be migrated)
TEMPORARY.domain_match: Any domain NOT in FORESEA list

apppoints_cost_matrix.description: Cost mapping for different license configurations
